title: nobody.jar
description: Early access of a story-based horror mod
body:
**A horror mod that explores worlds that are still yet to be made.**

The dimensions are barren places with dangerous architecture, one wrong step and you're falling in the void, up until now the mod contains 2 **(new update +2 +1)** liminal dimensions that to access you must try to break a block that looks like tree branches.

It can be accessed through a structure found in the overworld in forests.

Players must find the differences in the world to progress.

 

 

Please note that the mod is in very early access.

Any comments or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.
